item.title: Two killed in matatu crash on Thika Road
item.description: A head-on collision involving a matatu and a lorry on Thika Road left two people dead and several injured on Tuesday morning.

item.title: Flash floods displace families in Tana River
item.description: Heavy rains caused the Tana River to burst its banks, displacing dozens of families near the delta.

item.title: Nairobi county launches new tourism campaign
item.description: The county government unveiled a campaign to attract more visitors to the city's parks and museums.

item.title: Armed robbery reported at Eastleigh shopping centre
item.description: Police are searching for a gang that robbed a shop in Eastleigh, Nairobi, at gunpoint on Monday night.
